name: Chocolate Dessert Fondue (Crockette)
recipeIngredient: 8 chocolate candy bars (each about one ounce)
recipeInstructions:
1. Rub the inside of the crock pot with butter.
2. Place the chocolate candy bars, milk, and marshmallows in the crock pot.
3. Cover and cook on low heat until everything is melted and smooth.
4. Stir every 30 minutes to ensure even melting.
5. Gradually add whipping cream.
6. Cover and keep warm for serving up to 2 to 6 hours later.
7. Serve with bite-sized pieces of angel food cake, yellow cake, bananas, strawberries, grapes, or mandarin oranges.
